title: subworkflow - orchestration ops escalation stabilize and rollback
description: Orchestration subworkflow for ops-escalation / stabilize-and-rollback.\n\nThis workflow coordinates remediation or control-plane actions and always enforces execute -> wait -> check so actions are never fire-and-forget.
guide:
## 🎛️ Orchestration Subworkflow

### 🎯 Purpose
- Orchestrate ops escalation with stabilize and rollback and enforced post-action verification.

### ⚙️ Execution Pattern
- ▶️ Execute a primary Dynatrace action
- ⏳ Wait for completion/stabilization
- ✅ Check terminal status and fail when unsuccessful

### 🧩 Primary Action
- **dynatrace.aws.connector:ec2-wait-state**

### 🔐 Safety
- ❌ No fire-and-forget behavior
- ✅ Retries are enabled for wait stabilization checks

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final status validation for orchestration action.
